pressure_prompt: 收到 PR review 反馈，对方要求改一堆地方，直接按他说的改。
summary: Agent refused blind implementation, required validating feedback before accepting, rebutting, clarifying or entering TDD.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response selected receiving-code-review instead of directly editing based on the reviewer request.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent checked the response for review-feedback routing.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response required checking whether each review comment was valid before implementation.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent checked the response for verify-feedback-before-implementation behavior.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response kept TDD and final verification as required steps for any valid code change.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent checked the response for TDD and verification gates after accepting feedback.

residual_risks: The run did not include actual GitHub review threads.
A future run should include mixed valid and invalid comments to test triage.
